01 / The Notebook

YOUR NOTES,

YOUR BRAIN.

Daily notes with [[wikilinks]], Zettelkasten knowledge graph, Kanban boards all encrypted locally. Your AI agent lives inside your notes, reads your vault, answers inline. Like Obsidian, but with a private local AI built in.

Daily Note Wednesday
2025-03-05 · 08:41 #morning #strategy #orki

Review [[Series A Narrative]] before the investor call at 15h. Agent drafted the opening see below. Link to [[Regulatory Moat Analysis]] and [[Local Inference Architecture]].

Core thesis: privacy is a product feature, not a compliance checkbox. Our VIBOAI architecture creates a moat competitors cannot replicate without rebuilding from scratch.

✓

Analysed [[Series A Narrative]]. The core thesis centres on three defensible pillars: regulatory moat (EU AI Act compliance gap), architecture moat (local inference + SRI), and distribution moat (Zettelkasten-native workflow). See [[Regulatory Moat Analysis]] for technical depth.

📝
Daily Notes
Every day starts with an encrypted daily note. Date-stamped, private, yours. Open the app your note is ready.
🔗
[[Wikilinks]] + Graph
Bidirectional Zettelkasten links between notes. Build a private knowledge graph that grows with your thinking.
✅
Tasks + Kanban
Tasks live inside notes. Flip to Kanban view for projects. No Notion login, no subscription, no data leaving your device.
🤖
Inline Agent
Your local AI reads your vault and responds inline. Summarise, draft, connect ideas zero cloud exposure by default.
🔒
AES-256 at Rest
Every note, tag and wikilink encrypted. Passkey-locked. Even if your device is stolen, your vault is sealed.
02 / Plugin Ecosystem

CONNECT YOUR

WORLD.

Every plugin is privacy-preserving. Connect the tools you already use. SRI routes intelligently between all of them always choosing the most private path.

Cloud API
Ollama
// Cloud model API access
Access hosted models via API. Fast setup, managed inference, and flexible scaling for cloud-first workflows.
API key · model routing · managed endpoints
Connected
Google
// Calendar · Drive · Gmail
Read events, access Drive files, draft emails. Scoped read-only access. Your data never stored externally SRI queries on-demand.
Connected
Proton
// Mail · Calendar · Drive
End-to-end encrypted mail and calendar. The most private way to connect communications to your AI notebook. Zero-knowledge architecture.
Route available
Tor
// Onion routing · Privacy relay
Route cloud fallback traffic through the Tor network for stronger metadata privacy. Optional per request, with identity rotation controls.
Distributed
Exo Labs
// Distributed inference mesh
Share RAM across your devices for larger models. Run 70B models across phone, laptop and home server with encrypted peer links no cloud required.
RAM sharing · peer inference
Available
Anthropic
// Claude · Cloud fallback
When a task exceeds local capacity, SRI escalates to Claude. PII scrubbed before sending. Sandboxed to a folder. TOR optional.
Vault synced
Obsidian
// Notes vault bridge
Cross compatible with Obsidian. All [[wikilinks]], tags, and backlinks transfer. Years of notes, now with a private local AI.
More
// Coming soon
Notion bridge, Linear, GitHub, Slack read access, custom Ollama endpoints. Plugin API open to developers.
03 / SRI Architecture

SEMANTIC

ROUTING.

SRI understands your query and dispatches to the best model local first, always. Cloud models are containerised to a specific folder. The private AI sanitises memories before writing to your vault.

01
Local First

Ollama or on-device model handles 94% of queries instantly. No network call, no latency, no exposure.

02
Exo Mesh Fallback

If local RAM is insufficient, SRI distributes inference across your own devices via Exo.

03
Sandboxed Cloud

Cloud models see only their assigned folder. PII scrubbed. TOR optional. Memory quarantined before vault entry.

SRI Routing
Live
Queries stay local
<
Avg response ms
AES encryption
Data points collected

05 / Manifesto

PRIVACY IS NOT
A COMPLIANCE
checkbox.

I.

Your notebook is sacred. No company reads your thoughts.

II.

Your intelligence is yours. Not a product. Not training data.

III.

Private AI means the model runs where you decide.

IV.

Cloud should be an option, never a dependency.

V.

When cloud is used, it is sandboxed, scoped, sanitised.

VI.

Memory belongs to the person who built it.

VII.

Intelligence without privacy is just a subscription.
